prompt_preview:
You are a classical planning system. You are given a planning domain and a problem both in PDDL syntax.

STRICT REQUIREMENT: Your response must contain ONLY the executable plan — nothing else. No preamble, no explanation, no "We need to...", no natural-language commentary, no markdown unless it is a

message.content:
```pddl
(initialize_planning_option primary_day_segment_obj)
(assign_transport_option primary_day_segment_obj coach_transfer_obj)
(propose_activity_option primary_day_segment_obj museum_visit_obj)
(confirm_activity_option primary_day_segment_obj museum_visit_obj)
(reserve_accommodation_option primary_day_segment_obj boutique_hotel_obj)
(set_primary_access primary_day_segment_obj airport_arrival_slot_obj museum_visit_obj)
(prepare_primary_segment primary_day_segment_obj airport_arrival_slot_obj boutique_hotel_obj)
(release_accommodation_option primary_day_segment_obj boutique_hotel_obj)
(initialize_planning_option secondary_day_segment_obj)
(assign_transport_option secondary_day_segment_obj rail_connection_obj)
(propose_activity_option secondary_day_segment_obj museum_visit_obj)
(confirm_activity_option secondary_day_segment_obj museum_visit_obj)
(reserve_accommodation_option secondary_day_segment_obj boutique_hotel_obj)
(set_secondary_access secondary_day_segment_obj local_shuttle_obj museum_visit_obj)
(withdraw_activity_option secondary_day_segment_obj museum_visit_obj)
(prepare_secondary_segment secondary_day_segment_obj local_shuttle_obj boutique_hotel_obj)
(release_accommodation_option secondary_day_segment_obj boutique_hotel_obj)
(assemble_destination_proposal_clean primary_day_segment_obj secondary_day_segment_obj airport_arrival_slot_obj local_shuttle_obj destination_proposal_obj)
(propose_activity_option primary_day_segment_obj museum_visit_obj)
(validate_destination_proposal destination_proposal_obj primary_day_segment_obj museum_visit_obj)
(withdraw_activity_option primary_day_segment_obj museum_visit_obj)
(confirm_primary_segment_selection primary_day_segment_obj destination_proposal_obj)
(confirm_secondary_segment_selection secondary_day_segment_obj destination_proposal_obj)
(propose_activity_option primary_day_segment_obj museum_visit_obj)
(apply_trip_constraint primary_day_segment_obj budget_constraint_obj museum_visit_obj)
(finalize_primary_segment primary_day_segment_obj coach_transfer_obj budget_constraint_obj)
(withdraw_activity_option primary_day_segment_obj museum_visit_obj)
(propose_activity_option secondary_day_segment_obj museum_visit_obj)
(apply_trip_constraint secondary_day_segment_obj budget_constraint_obj museum_visit_obj)
(finalize_secondary_segment secondary_day_segment_obj rail_connection_obj budget_constraint_obj)
(withdraw_activity_option secondary_day_segment_obj museum_visit_obj)
(initialize_planning_option itinerary_variant_alpha_obj)
(assign_transport_option itinerary_variant_alpha_obj private_transfer_obj)
(propose_activity_option itinerary_variant_alpha_obj museum_visit_obj)
(confirm_activity_option itinerary_variant_alpha_obj museum_visit_obj)
(reserve_accommodation_option itinerary_variant_alpha_obj boutique_hotel_obj)
(assign_time_window itinerary_variant_alpha_obj morning_time_window_obj)
(apply_promotion_offer itinerary_variant_alpha_obj early_booking_promotion_obj museum_visit_obj)
(integrate_accommodation itinerary_variant_alpha_obj boutique_hotel_obj)
(mark_variant_ready itinerary_variant_alpha_obj morning_time_window_obj)
(release_accommodation_option itinerary_variant_alpha_obj boutique_hotel_obj)
(release_time_window itinerary_variant_alpha_obj morning_time_window_obj)
(approve_variant itinerary_variant_alpha_obj)
(withdraw_activity_option itinerary_variant_alpha_obj museum_visit_obj)
(propose_activity_option itinerary_variant_alpha_obj museum_visit_obj)
(apply_trip_constraint itinerary_variant_alpha_obj budget_constraint_obj museum_visit_obj)
(finalize_itinerary_variant itinerary_variant_alpha_obj private_transfer_obj budget_constraint_obj)
(withdraw_activity_option itinerary_variant_alpha_obj museum_visit_obj)
(initialize_planning_option itinerary_variant_beta_obj)
(assign_transport_option itinerary_variant_beta_obj coach_transfer_obj)
(propose_activity_option itinerary_variant_beta_obj museum_visit_obj)
(confirm_activity_option itinerary_variant_beta_obj museum_visit_obj)
(reserve_accommodation_option itinerary_variant_beta_obj boutique_hotel_obj)
(assign_service_addon itinerary_variant_beta_obj guided_service_addon_obj)
(assign_time_window itinerary_variant_beta_obj morning_time_window_obj)
(attach_activity_bundle itinerary_variant_beta_obj activity_bundle_beta_obj destination_proposal_obj)
(activate_variant_base itinerary_variant_beta_obj activity_bundle_beta_obj destination_proposal_obj museum_visit_obj)
(integrate_lodging_services_clean itinerary_variant_beta_obj guided_service_addon_obj boutique_hotel_obj activity_bundle_beta_obj destination_proposal_obj)
(schedule_variant_clean itinerary_variant_beta_obj morning_time_window_obj activity_bundle_beta_obj destination_proposal_obj)
(confirm_variant_directly itinerary_variant_beta_obj)
(apply_trip_constraint itinerary_variant_beta_obj budget_constraint_obj museum_visit_obj)
(finalize_itinerary_variant itinerary_variant_beta_obj coach_transfer_obj budget_constraint_obj)
```
message.reasoning:
The problem is a classical planning problem in PDDL. I need to output only the executable plan as a sequence of ground PDDL actions, one per line, in the format (action-name arg1 arg2 ...).


## Understanding the Problem  
- The task involves solving a classical planning problem in PDDL, focusing on generating an executable plan.  
- The plan must consist of ground PDDL actions, listed one per line, in the format (action-name arg1 arg2 ...).  
- The goal state is part of the problem, but specific details are not yet provided.

## Building the Planning Process  
- Segments need initialization first, like initializing primary_day_segment_obj, to start as drafted.  
- Actions like assign_transport_option and propose_activity_option help move segments to transport_assigned and activity_link states.  

## Linking and Preparing Segments  
- Confirm_activity_option sets segments to ready after transport and activity are linked.  
- Set_primary_access requires ready segments with activity and access links to establish preferred access.  

## Finalizing Segment States  
- Finalize actions, like finalize_primary_segment, require constraint_applied, transport, and constraint links, and mark segments as finalized.  
- Apply_trip_constraint needs chosen_state, achieved via confirm_primary_segment_selection after proposal assembly and validation.  

## Assembling Proposals  
- Assembling destination proposals requires open, ready segments and preferred access, starting from a draft like destination_proposal_obj.  
- Proposal validation ensures segments are set for selection, leading to chosen_state for finalization.

## Exploring Variant Initialization  
- Variants like itinerary_variant_alpha_obj and itinerary_variant_beta_obj need initialization to drafted state.  
- All planning options, including segments and variants, must be initialized first to start the planning process.  

## Assigning Resources to Variants  
- Assign_transport_option applies to variants, requiring a drafted state and available transport like coach or rail.  
- Variants may share activities, but only one museum_visit_obj exists, potentially limiting assignment options.  

## Managing Activity Links for Variants  
- Variants need activity_link to be ready, achieved through propose_activity and confirm_activity actions.  
- Multiple entities competing for one activity, like museum_visit_obj, may require sequencing to avoid conflicts.  

## Considering Alternate Paths for Variants  
- Variants can reach chosen_state via promotion paths, like apply_promotion, requiring ready state and available promotions.  
- Another option is confirm_variant_directly, needing scheduled state, possibly bypassing activity requirements.  

## Handling Resource Constraints  
- Transports and constraints can be reused after finalize actions, as finalize releases them for reassignment.  
- Accommodations like boutique_hotel remain linked after finalization, potentially limiting availability for multiple entities.

## Planning Segment Initialization  
- Start by initializing primary_day_segment_obj, then assign transport like coach_transfer_obj to prepare for activities.  
- Propose and confirm museum_visit_obj for primary, establishing a ready state with accommodation and access links.

## Managing Activity Assignments  
- Activity like museum_visit_obj must be linked to primary before secondary, as it’s a shared resource available to one entity at a time.  
- Withdrawing activity from primary after setting access makes it available again, allowing secondary to propose and confirm later.  

## Validating Proposal Requirements  
- Validate_destination_proposal requires planning_entity_activity_link on primary, so activity withdrawal must happen after validation.  
- After validation, primary no longer needs the activity link, enabling reuse for secondary without conflicts.  

## Sequencing Segment Actions  
- Set_primary_access needs activity_link, but prepare_primary_segment only requires ready, accom_link, and access_link.  
- For secondary, ensure own activity_link for actions like set_secondary_access, following a similar sequence as primary.

## Managing Variant Promotions  
- Variants like alpha can use promotion paths, such as early_booking, if available; beta lacks package_discount, limiting promotion options.  
- Promotion requires variant_promotion_link, but availability checks block beta from applying promotions without alternative paths.  

## Exploring Bundle Paths for Variants  
- Variants can follow bundle paths after segments finalize, starting with init and requiring ready state, accommodation reservation, and service assignment.  
- Activate_variant_base needs ready variant, bundle link, and no primary gaps, leveraging assembled proposals from segments.  

## Handling Shared Resources for Variants  
- Shared resources like guided_service_addon can be assigned with time windows, making them unavailable until release_time_window restores availability.  
- Activities and accommodations can be shared similarly, using withdraw and release actions to manage conflicts between variants.

## Managing Variant Finalization  
- After finalizing alpha, resources like museum_visit_obj become available if withdrawn, enabling reuse for beta.  
- Finalize_itinerary_variant for alpha doesn’t remove activity_link, so manual withdrawal is needed for sharing.  

## Releasing Shared Resources  
- Release_accommodation for alpha boutique_hotel_obj after integrate_accommodation makes it available for beta, removing the link.  
- Similarly, release_time_window for alpha morning_time_window_obj after mark_variant_ready restores availability for beta.  

## Executing Beta Bundle Path  
- Initialize beta with itinerary_variant_beta_obj, then assign transport like rail_connection_obj if available post-alpha.  
- Propose and confirm activities like museum_visit_obj for beta, ensuring readiness before reserving accommodations.

## Adjusting Variant Initialization  
- Withdraw activity options like museum_visit_obj from secondary_day_segment_obj before starting variant planning to ensure availability.  
- Initialize itinerary_variant_alpha_obj after withdrawal, allowing subsequent actions like proposing and confirming activities.  

## Sequencing Variant Actions  
- Confirm activities and reserve accommodations for itinerary_variant_alpha_obj before marking variant ready, ensuring all links are in place.  
- Mark_variant_ready must occur before releasing time_window, as it requires time_link; approve_variant follows after readiness is confirmed.  

## Managing Resource Release  
- Release accommodation and time_window options after integration and readiness, making them available for subsequent variants like beta.  
- Withdraw activity options post-finalization to free resources, enabling reuse in other variants without conflicts.  

## Executing Beta Variant Path  
- Initialize itinerary_variant_beta_obj and assign available transport options like coach_transfer_obj, ensuring resource availability post-alpha.  
- Propose and confirm activities, reserve accommodations, and attach bundles, integrating services to complete the beta planning sequence.

pddl2nl_prompt.note: autoplanbench_pddl2nl: run_save_descriptions.py --type full — шаблоны/JSON, без вызова LLM на построение промпта для сэмпла.

domain_setup.note: Файл domain_llm_usage_seedN.json не найден для section/subsection этого id (старый autoplanbench или домен не пересобирали). После run_domain_setup с обновлённым autoplanbench файл появится рядом с domain_description_seedN.json.

pipeline_usage.totals_scope_note: Per-run totals = planning + pddl2nl_prompt + nl2pddl (только tracked=true). domain_setup всегда вне totals (included_in_per_run_totals=false); цифры в блоке — для справки, агрегировать отдельно: domain_llm_usage_seed*.json + дедуп в collect_pipeline_token_usage.py.
